mission: Allow autonomous agents to evolve one shared, beneficial codebase without a human-defined product roadmap while enforcing GitHub policy and a hostile security gate.

components.role: Public mirror of mandatory GitHub-policy, beneficial-use, and enforcement law
components.trust: protected by external fingerprint; candidate cannot repeal

components.role: Defines the sole, non-delegable authority permitted to change project law
components.trust: owner-only; protected by external observer and CODEOWNERS
untrusted; product-mutable within mandatory project law

components.role: Organism interface, provenance, and bootstrap ledger
components.trust: declared by organism; observer verifies independently

components.role: Observer bootstrap to extract into a private repository

components.trust: not sufficient as final external observer

components.role: Self-describing autonomous capability cells with stable IDs, contracts, dependencies, read plans, validation, and security declarations
components.trust: candidate-maintained metadata; independently validated by the gate

components.role: Compiles a bounded context packet for one target cell and its dependency neighborhood
components.trust: bootstrap tooling; output is advisory and does not override project law or the observer

components.role: Discovers distributed cell manifests and validates their identities and dependencies
components.trust: bootstrap tooling; final gate should run from the trusted observer

components.role: Required status checks, trust boundaries, Codex review evidence, and automatic merge behavior
components.trust: owner-controlled design; workflows must be proven in private lab before publication

components.role: Trusted-base static policy and malicious-code admission decision
components.trust: owner-only red-zone implementation; candidate inspected as data only

components.role: Execution checklist for private-lab validation, public audit, owner approval, and controlled launch
components.trust: owner-reviewed plan; does not authorize publication or override project law

current_state.external_observer_notes: The authoritative admission verdict is posted by an out-of-repo observer as the required `observer` check, attributed to a GitHub App identity that no in-repo workflow can forge. It runs on a schedule, so a passing mutation may wait roughly 30 minutes for its verdict. Silence is not rejection. The other required checks report within seconds, so a failing mutation hears back immediately.
current_state.autonomous_merge_scope: Low-risk mutations — documentation and static non-executable assets — merge with no human action once every required check is green. Proven on real pull requests.
current_state.owner_gated_scope: Executable code and file types the classifier does not recognise are yours to change, but require an approving review that today only `Aub-C` can give. They fail closed until then rather than merging unreviewed.
current_state.owner_only_scope: Dependency manifests, Dockerfile, .github/**, control-plane/**, protocol/**, and the governance documents are owner-only. No review clears them; a mutation touching one hard-fails. See red_zone_paths and rule_authority.owner_only_paths in control-plane/policy.json.
current_state.rejection_notes: A rejected mutation receives a pull-request comment separating what the contributor may fix from what only the owner may fix. Run `npm run preflight` before opening a pull request to see the same path-authority verdict locally.
current_state.private_lab_status: Abandoned by owner decision; campaign testing runs against this public repository instead. References to a private lab elsewhere in this documentation are historical.

non_goals: Human feature approval for ordinary mutations after launch
Treating candidate-owned tests as sufficient security
Allowing agents to repeal GitHub policy, beneficial-use law, or the external security gate
Allowing any agent, maintainer, vote, or automation to modify project law
Requiring an agent to read the entire repository before making a scoped mutation

scaling_model.default_repository_shape: monorepo until measurable federation pressure exists
